titleEn: Conference to examine scaling autonomous farming technology
titleZh: 会议聚焦自主农业技术规模化应用
summaryZh: 农业机器人行业过去十年证明了自主化的可行性，未来十年将聚焦于哪些公司能成功实现工业化。Ruggedize公司CEO Nolan Paul将在8月26-27日于萨利纳斯举行的深科技会议上发表演讲，强调以种植者为中心，开发结合硬件、软件和数据洞察的自主系统，帮助果园和葡萄园实现可持续、盈利和韧性发展。
translationZh:
农业机器人行业过去十年证明了自主化是可行的。未来十年预计将聚焦于哪些公司能成功实现工业化。

这正是Ruggedize公司CEO Nolan Paul在即将于8月26日至27日在萨利纳斯Reservoir举行的农业机器人与物理AI深科技会议上的演讲主题。

据该公司介绍，其方法从种植者出发，认识到种植者比任何算法都更了解自己的土地。公司表示，他们开发的自主系统通过将硬件、软件和数据驱动的洞察整合到一个随时间不断改进的互联平台中，来补充种植者的专业知识，帮助果园和葡萄园保持可持续、盈利和韧性。
featuredReason: 该新闻聚焦自主农业技术从演示到工业化的关键转折，对智慧畜牧与种植领域的自动化趋势具有前瞻性指导意义，尤其适合关注技术落地的行业从业者。
contentFull:

 Conference to examine scaling autonomous farming technology

 

 
 The agricultural robotics industry has spent the past decade demonstrating that autonomy is possible. The next decade is expected to be defined by which companies can successfully industrialise it.

 © Yamaha Agriculture

 That is the focus of the presentation by Nolan Paul, CEO, at Ruggedize, a new deep-tech conference on agricultural robotics and physical AI taking place on August 26 to 27 at Reservoir in Salinas.

 © Yamaha Agriculture

 According to the company, its approach starts with the grower, recognising that growers know their land better than any algorithm. The company says it develops autonomous systems that complement that expertise by integrating hardware, software, and data-driven insights into a connected platform that improves over time, helping orchards and vineyards remain sustainable, profitable, and resilient.

 For more information:Yamaha Agriculturewww.yamaha-agriculture.com
